[DQC.US.0110.9559] The company has reported a value of 143,000 as the default value paid for acquisitions. This represents all acquisitions during the period. However the period is for 23 day(s), which is less than the reporting period, based on the document period end date. If the amount represents a specific acquisition then the business acquisition axis must be used.
The properties of this us-gaap:BusinessCombinationConsiderationTransferred1 fact are: Period :2021-04-01 to 2021-04-23 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9559 Rule version: 29.0.2 - ASII_instance_2024_2025.xml 1653
